titleStmt.title: SII 6.200: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 200. (A.R. No. 237 of 1897). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithivīvallabha mahārājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka ravikulatilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara pāṇḍyakulāṁtaka sa
mastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikramacōḍa vijayābharaṇa śrīrājakēśari
va¨rmmapē¨rmmānaḍigalu gaṁggākāvēripa¨ryyaṁtaṁ saptamōviṣṇuva¨rddanulaina śrīmattri
bhuvanacakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadevara prava¨rddhamāna divyasaṁvatsa 37 śrāhi śrī
nu koḍuku praśasta na muḍigoṇḍacōḍabrahmamā
rāyaṇḍu kulōttuṁggacōḍamaṇdalamuna Uttamacōḍavalanāṇṭhi kammanāṇṭhi dudyavā
ḍalōni prēṁpalli śrībhāvadēvaraguḍi sthānapati viṣṇuva¨rddhanapaṇḍitulu dēvaka¨rmmibhāvanārā
yeṇa brahmamārāyaṇḍunu bhaṇḍāri rājanārāyaṇa brahmamārāyaṇḍunu bhaṇḍāri madusūda
nuṇḍunu tirumaṁjana vellimū¨rttibhaṭlunu stōtra kēśavabhaṭlunu śrīvaiṣṇavakaṁggāni cīrāmana
bhaṭlu sānisūravadārakayu dribhuvanayeṟi bāveyāyaka jillava sūrakayu prō
lavagōkavayu Atyakagōkavayu Eṟiyavakāṭakayu ko¨rmmavamrānakayu mrānava
kāmakayu kāmavakāṭekayu sūrava yakayu brammavamrānakayu Eṟi
yavakraṁtiyu mrānavasūrakayu mrānava kayu mannivajallakayu mallava
Eṟiyakayu nāyavapennakayu sūravaponnakayu ponnavacūrakayu ponnavamrānakayu
sūravanaṁggayu muduvavakāmakayu kēśavamallakayu malliyaprōlavayu malla
vajaggavayu vīravakāmakayu pōnavaEṟiyakayu sūravajaggavayu caduka tirumalaka
yu naṭṭavula mrānayayu paricāraka mādhavayayu paricāraka brahmadēvaṇḍunu paricā
raka nārāyanuṇḍunu paricāraka mrānaṇḍunu paricāraka śrīdharuṇḍunu tirumayigāvala
gaṇḍaparaḍḍiyu rāghavuṇḍunu dāmayayu berasina padipādamūlapaṭṭuḍa paṁcācā¨ryya
dēvaka¨rmmalamu muḍigoṇḍacōḍabrahmamārāyaricē sālābhōgamunaku pe¨rmmaḍi ko
rājarājamāḍalu muppadiyuṁ jēkoni caṁdrādityavare nitya Aivuru Apū¨rvvi brāhmanulaku mriṣṭānnabhōjana
munaku nokkaniki tirumaḍapalliki Aceḍi kuṁcamu 2 paḍini nālgu kuṁcamulu
kuṁcamulu Iruvaḍigā . nellakālamu naḍapaṁgalavāramu Ipaḍlalō vāra
mu I mā¨rggamu naḍapaṁgalavāramu naḍapanināṇḍu nī rāṁkkayu sa¨rvva
mapaṟibā I dha¨rmmamu pratipāliṁpaṁgalavārugā sammadiṁci Icci I mā¨rggamu ta
bānarāsi vraccinavāramu gaṁggakaṟuta kavulapasuramu vadhiIṁcinavāramu pe
koḍuku kapālamuna guḍicinavāramu sānivāri vaṁssānvayamulu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamunaḍapa
ṁgalavāramu tāṁbraśāsanamu śilālikhitamu
dēvaga¨rmmulamu svasti sakavaruṣaṁbulu ṇṭhi praUnfinished.
Digital edition of SII 6.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
